mapper.select: SELECT * FROM subscription_plan WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM subscription_plan WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT * FROM subscription_benefit_policy WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY plan_code ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM subscription_benefit_policy WHERE plan_code = #{planCode} AND active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_feature_benefit_policy WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY benefit_code ASC, feature_type ASC
SELECT * FROM credit_product WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM credit_product WHERE code = #{code}

SELECT * FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'CANCELED') AND (#{now} IS NULL OR (current_period_start <= #{now} AND current_period_end > #{now})) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_subscription (user_id, plan_code, status, started_at, current_period_start, current_period_end, policy_snapshot_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{planCode}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{currentPeriodStart}, #{currentPeriodEnd}, #{policySnapshotJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_subscription SET status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT plan FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_benefit_balance (user_id, benefit_code, period_start, period_end, granted_quantity, used_quantity, remaining_quantity, source_plan_code, source_type, source_code) VALUES (#{userId}, #{benefitCode}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{grantedQuantity}, #{usedQuantity}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{sourcePlanCode}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceCode})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_benefit_balance SET used_quantity = used_quantity + 1, remaining_quantity = remaining_quantity - 1 WHERE id = #{balanceId} AND remaining_quantity > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO benefit_transaction (user_id, benefit_code, transaction_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, ai_usage_log_id, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{benefitCode}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{aiUsageLogId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (user_id, provider, product_type, product_code, order_id, payment_key, amount, plan, credit_amount, policy_snapshot_json, status, paid_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{productType}, #{productCode}, #{orderId}, #{paymentKey}, #{amount}, #{plan}, #{creditAmount}, #{policySnapshotJson}, #{status}, #{paidAt})

INSERT INTO credit_transaction (user_id, ai_usage_log_id, type, amount, balance_after, feature_type, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{aiUsageLogId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{featureType}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM credit_transaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT feature_type AS featureType, COUNT(*) AS used, COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) AS creditUsed FROM ai_usage_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{from} GROUP BY feature_type ORDER BY used DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(status = 'PAID'), 0) AS paidCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PAID' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRevenue FROM payment
